stemHtml: For an aircraft flying through a Nimbostratus cloud on a warm front, with the 0°C isotherm located at 6 000 ft and the local QNH measured at 994 hPa, at which flight level would the airframe icing caused by freezing rain be most severe?

options.a: At a flight level that is far above the cloud tops.
options.c: At the lowest flight level possible.
